issues.sample: The contact's son owns a 2017 Jaguar XF. The contact stated that there was water inside the trunk of the vehicle where the battery was located. The contact was unaware of the location of the leak. The contact stated that the electrical wiring was corroded from the water intrusion

narrative.headline: What 2017 Jaguar Xf owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 5 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
